data.body: What killed the browsing vision was scale. Wikipedia: 7 million articles, 1 million editors, 25 years. Twitter in 2013: 500 million posts per day. Human trail-blazing couldn't keep up with information production. So we got feeds instead — one path, one direction, scroll down.
